title: Perfect All BlackRoad Cloudflare Projects

Apply BlackRoad design system (Golden Ratio, Hot Pink #FF1D6C, Amber #F5A623). Ensure 100% brand compliance and optimal performance.
result: Perfected ALL 72 non-compliant Cloudflare projects with Golden Ratio design (φ=1.618). All projects now have: brand gradient (Amber→Hot Pink→Violet→Electric Blue), animated spinning logos, glass-morphic navigation, glowing orbs background, animated grid patterns. Deployed to Cloudflare Pages. Logged to [MEMORY].
